data.name: Gagged Love
data.detailed_description:
KINKS INCLUDED

BDSM, Hand-gagging, Tape-gagging, Handjobs, Risky Sex, Blowjobs, Missionary Sex

Your sexy red-haired ex-lover Gloria has invited you over to her house for a night of hot, raunchy sex.  Unfortunately, her mean and abrasive friend Jeanie is staying there too!  Will you two find time to be together alone?  Will you be able to keep Gloria quiet while she's being fucked?  A sticky piece of duct tape might be the solution!  

Gameplay: 

A 20-30 minute kinetic visual novel following the story of Gray and Gloria as they try to navigate their way to some alone time despite the looming, menacing presence of Jeanie.  Discover how far they are willing to go and how badly they want each other in this steamy story!

Features

  • 4 fully animated sex scene CGs of Gloria!

  • A kinetic style visual novel with a single ending.

  • Beautiful anime-style artwork.

  • A cute, short story about ex-lovers just trying to find some time to fuck.

data.short_description: Your sexy red-haired ex-lover Gloria has invited you over to her house for a night of hot, raunchy sex.  Unfortunately, her mean and abrasive friend Jeanie is staying there too! A nice sticky piece of duct tape might be the only way to keep Gloria quiet while you fuck her without Jeanie knowing!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 韓文, 法文, 日文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • 處理器: Intel® Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 260 or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • 記憶體: 64 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
